encodings: x: Customer_Info.age (binned with step=10, title='Age Group')
visualization.description: Stacked bar chart showing distribution of churned vs retained customers across age groups (binned in 10-year increments)

views.components: Age bin size selector (dropdown with 5/10/15 year options)

effect.description: Filter subsequent views to show data for selected age group

visualization.description: Faceted donut charts showing churn distribution breakdown by gender and senior status within selected age group
Horizontal bar charts showing relationship between service contracts, internet types and churn rates within selected demographic segment
Scatter plot showing CLTV vs Satisfaction Score with revenue indication, filtered by demographic selections

outputs.path: The user starts with View 1 (Overview) seeing churn distribution across age groups. Selecting an age range filters Views 2-4. View 2 (Exploration) reveals gender/seniority patterns. Hovering segments in View 2 highlights related service contracts in View 3. View 4 (Detail) shows CLTV/satisfaction relationships for selected demographics. Follow-up selections in any view filter subsequent analysis layers.
